title: Feed sweep, 3 feed(s) (2026-07-22)

Menlo led Anthropic’s $500M Series D, and Murphy has had a front-row seat as the company went from a pre-revenue, […] https://techcrunch.com/podcast/menlo-ventures-matt-murphy-explains-what-ai-startups-founders-must-do-differently/ OpenAI’s AI spending spree has ballooned to $750B AI News & Artificial Intelligence | TechCrunch 2026-07-22 OpenAI will spend the equivalent of Sweden's GDP on infrastructure through 2030. https://techcrunch.com/2026/07/22/openais-ai-spending-spree-has-ballooned-to-750b/ Substack’s new tool tells you who’s been writing their newsletters with AI AI News & Artificial Intelligence | TechCrunch 2026-07-22 Substack is giving readers a way to estimate how much of a newsletter was written by AI, signaling a broader shift toward transparency around AI-assisted content. https://techcrunch.com/2026/07/22/substacks-new-tool-tells-you-whos-been-writing-their-newsletters-with-ai/ Arcee, a US open source AI lab, says Chinese models are not inherently dangerous AI News & Artificial Intelligence | TechCrunch 2026-07-22 As Chinese AI models grow in capability and popularity among U.S. companies, the arguing over what should be done about them has reached a fever pitch. https://techcrunch.com/2026/07/22/arcee-a-us-open-source-ai-lab-says-chinese-models-are-not-inherently-dangerous/ Monday.com lays off hundreds to focus on AI AI News & Artificial Intelligence | TechCrunch 2026-07-22 The company said it is reducing its headcount by 20%, or about 630 staff, to "support a leaner, more focused operating model" as it focuses on its AI Work Platform. https://techcrunch.com/2026/07/22/monday-com-lays-off-hundreds-to-focuses-on-ai/ Yope raises $12.3M to build a private social network without algorithms or ads AI News & Artificial Intelligence | TechCrunch 2026-07-22 Yope, a fast-growing social app focused on private groups of friends and family, has raised $12.3 million in seed funding.
